nosotros.resultado: Duy Amis is the result of a tradition that merges with technological innovation to offer selected products of superior quality.
nosotros.tamboagondola: From the Dairy Farm to the Shelf
nosotros.camino: This is the path of each product
nosotros.crianza: Responsible breeding, controlled feeding and respect for natural cycles.
nosotros.tecnologia: Technology that improves efficiency and reduces animal stress.
nosotros.analisis: Immediate analysis before leaving the dairy farm.
nosotros.elaboracion: Processing of cheeses, dulce de leche and cream using modern processes.
nosotros.desde: From our selected production to the shelves of the entire country.
nosotros.planta: In our processing plant, we transform the purest raw material into unique gastronomic experiences.
nosotros.creemos: We believe in sustainability, in respect for the animal and in total traceability, guaranteeing that every product that reaches your table is exceptional.
